fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. The spec defines the mandatory startup order from session check-in through stop/handoff capture. 2. The planning slice defines session ownership and required worktree metadata. 3. The planning slice defines reuse vs rotation rules, with rotation as the default handoff path. 4. The planning slice defines the authority boundary across session-api, draftboard, and hooks. 5. The planning slice leaves e2189e9d as the next implementation slice and 326bfe38 as the follow-on rollout.
fields.title: [workflow][session-worktree] Plan default worktree-backed session workflow
